name: todo-app-3
description: todo-app-3 — root tooling scope (lint and format only). Application code lives in client/ and server/.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.test: npm test --prefix client && npm test --prefix server
scripts.test:coverage: concurrently --group --names client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run test:coverage --prefix client" "npm run test:coverage --prefix server"
scripts.docker:verify: docker compose up -d --build && npm run test:docker && docker compose down
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
